2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

<!-- What you expected to happen -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened -->

## 📸 Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## 🖥️ Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser** (if frontend): [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Node Version** (if frontend): [e.g., 20.10.0]
- **.NET Version** (if backend): [e.g., 8.0.1]
- **Docker Version** (if applicable): [e.g., 24.0.7]

<!-- Paste relevant logs, error messages, or stack traces -->
```
Paste logs here
```

## 🔍 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## 💡 Possible Solution
<!-- Optional: Suggest a fix or reason for the bug -->

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] 🔴 Critical (System down, data loss)
- [ ] 🟠 High (Major feature broken)
- [ ] 🟡 Medium (Feature partially working)
- [ ] 🟢 Low (Minor issue, workaround available)
